poll.question: Should Marcus tell Jade what she means to him, or let this trust deepen in silence?

options.label: Speak tonight
options.desc: Risk vulnerability; say exactly what you feel

options.label: Trust the silence
options.desc: Your steadiness speaks louder than words

options.label: All together
options.desc: Make it a moment all four of you share

in_play.label: Yes, keep it
in_play.desc: Love means choosing to be needed, even if it's terrifying
